name: contactSeller_PositiveFlow_LoggedOutUser
description: Verify that all seller contact actions redirect logged-out user to Login modal.
descriptionHtml: Verify that all seller contact actions redirect logged-out user to Login modal.

testStage.description: Verify that all seller contact actions redirect logged-out user to Login modal.

steps.name: Action: Shop from this dealer's view page
Open Contact Seller for selected car
Click on Shop from this dealer's view page
The action navigated to login pop up
Action: Copying seller's contact information
Open Contact Seller for selected car
Click on Copying seller's contact information
The action navigated to login pop up
Action: View Seller Contact Number
Open Contact Seller for selected car
Click on View Seller Contact Number
The action navigated to login pop up
Action: Start Chat on Whatsapp
Open Contact Seller for selected car
Click on Start Chat on Whatsapp
The action navigated to login pop up
Action: Log in to view Dealer Address
Open Contact Seller for selected car
Click on Log in to view Dealer Address
The action navigated to login pop up

labels.name: feature
labels.value: Marketplace - Contact Seller Logged Out User
